mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient (patient_name, patient_phone, patient_idcard, patient_gender, patient_age, patient_birthday, patient_address, patient_blood_type, patient_allergy, hospital_id) VALUES (#{patient.patientName}, #{patient.patientPhone}, #{patient.patientIdcard}, #{patient.patientGender}, #{patient.patientAge}, #{patient.patientBirthday}, #{patient.patientAddress}, #{patient.patientBloodType}, #{patient.patientAllergy}, #{patient.hospitalId})
mapper.update:
UPDATE patient
patient_name=#{patient.patientName},
patient_phone=#{patient.patientPhone},
patient_idcard=#{patient.patientIdcard},
patient_gender=#{patient.patientGender},
patient_age=#{patient.patientAge},
patient_birthday=#{patient.patientBirthday},
patient_address=#{patient.patientAddress},
patient_blood_type=#{patient.patientBloodType},
patient_allergy=#{patient.patientAllergy},
hospital_id=#{patient.hospitalId}
id = #{patient.id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM patient WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM patient
AND patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{patientName}, '%')
AND patient_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{patientPhone}, '%')
AND patient_idcard LIKE CONCAT('%', #{patientIdcard}, '%')
